---
title: "Notebook Library"
---

This page collects rendered notebook materials used by the advanced pathway. The Python notebooks are used for the Summer 2026 epidemic modeling project. The R Markdown file is included as a test format for future projects that may use R.

## Summer 2026: Epidemic Modeling

1. [Day 1: Python Foundations for Modeling and Inference](../project_1/materials/Day1_revised.ipynb)
2. [Day 2: SIR Models, Euler's Method, and Markov Chains](../project_1/materials/Day2_revised_realdata_executed.ipynb)
3. [Day 3: MCMC and Inference for State Space Models](../project_1/materials/Day3_revised_realdata_executed.ipynb)
4. [Intro to Markov Chains](../project_1/materials/markov_chains.ipynb)
5. [Intro to MCMC and Inference for State Space Models](../project_1/materials/MCMC.ipynb)

## Future Project Formats

1. [R Markdown example file](example_R.Rmd)
